_note: Pope's Worldwide Prayer Network monthly intentions. Edit in Settings or update from popesprayerusa.net. Keys are YYYY-MM.
2026-01: For the Church: that we may rediscover the joy of the Gospel and announce it with renewed courage.
2026-02: For families in difficulty: that the Lord may sustain them and help them rebuild bonds of love.
2026-03: For new martyrs of our time: that their witness may strengthen the Church's commitment to peace and justice.
2026-04: For vocations to the priesthood and consecrated life: that young people may respond generously to God's call.
2026-05: For seminarians and those in formation: that Mary, Mother of the Church, may guide them with her tender care.
2026-06: For migrants fleeing war and hunger: that they may find welcome and new opportunities in the countries that receive them.
2026-07: For a Eucharistic life: that the celebration of the Eucharist may renew the Church and transform the world.
2026-08: For political leaders: that they may serve the common good with integrity and place the dignity of the human person above all interests.
2026-09: For the abolition of the death penalty: that the dignity of human life may be defended in every legal system.
2026-10: For the missionary spirit of the Church: that all the baptized may participate in the mission of evangelization.
2026-11: For those who have lost loved ones: that the Lord may console them and grant the deceased eternal rest.
2026-12: For Christians preparing for Christmas: that they may welcome the Lord with hearts full of joy and hope.
